questionHtml: State, with a reason, whether the ammonium ion is a Brønsted-Lowry acid or base.
markschemeHtml:
«Brønsted-Lowry» acid AND can donate a proton/H+

OR

«Brønsted-Lowry» acid AND cannot accept proton/H+ ✔

meta.title: State, with a reason, whether the ammonium ion is a Brønsted-Lowry acid or base.
